channel.title: BIDU — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on BIDU (Baidu) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Michael Burry: TRIMMED BIDU (-20%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Michael Burry (Scion Asset Management) trimmed BIDU in Q3 2025 · 14.8% of portfolio. Reduced Baidu to fund BABA add.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Michael Burry)
